    have h₄ : ∑ i : Fin n, |(y i - x i) * nth_partial i f x| ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, (|y i - x i| * |nth_partial i f x|) := by

    have h₅ : ∑ i : Fin n, (|y i - x i| * |nth_partial i f x|) ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, (ε * |nth_partial i f x|) := by

      intro i _
      have h₅₁ : |y i - x i| ≤ ε := by

          -- Use the given condition |x i - y i| ≤ ε
          have h₅₃ := hdiff i
          simpa [abs_sub_comm] using h₅₃
        -- Relate |y i - x i| to |x i - y i|
        calc
          |y i - x i| = |-(x i - y i)| := by ring_nf
          _ = |x i - y i| := by rw [abs_neg]
          _ ≤ ε := h₅₂
      have h₅₂ : 0 ≤ |nth_partial i f x| := abs_nonneg _
      nlinarith [h₅₁, h₅₂]
    have h₆ : ∑ i : Fin n, (ε * |nth_partial i f x|) = ε * ∑ i : Fin n, |nth_partial i f x| := by
      rw [Finset.mul_sum]
    calc

      _ ≤ ∑ i : Fin n, (|y i - x i| * |nth_partial i f x|) := h₄
